DIM.SELECT: SELECT A.oi_tipo_empresa, A.d_tipo_empresa, A.c_tipo_empresa FROM ORG05_TIPOS_EMPR as A
SELECT A.oi_empresa, A.c_empresa, A.d_empresa, A.oi_tipo_empresa FROM ORG03_EMPRESAS as A
SELECT A.oi_ubicacion, A.c_ubicacion, A.d_ubicacion, A.oi_empresa FROM ORG03_UBICACIONES as A
SELECT A.oi_grupo_sanguineo, A.c_grupo_sanguineo, A.d_grupo_sanguineo FROM PER10_GRUPOS_SANG as A
SELECT A.oi_grupo_sanguineo, A.c_grupo_sanguineo, A.d_grupo_sanguineo FROM PER10_GRUPOS_SANG as A
SELECT A.oi_pais, A.c_pais, A.d_pais FROM ORG35_PAISES as A
SELECT A.oi_provincia, A.c_provincia, A.d_provincia, A.oi_pais FROM ORG35_PROVINCIAS as A
SELECT A.oi_localidad, A.c_localidad, A.d_localidad, A.oi_provincia FROM ORG19_LOCALIDADES as A
SELECT A.oi_nacionalidad, A.c_nacionalidad, A.d_nacionalidad FROM ORG12_NACIONALID as A
SELECT A.oi_nivel_estudio, A.c_nivel_estudio, A.d_nivel_estudio FROM per12_niveles_est as A
SELECT A.oi_idioma, A.c_idioma, A.d_idioma FROM ORG20_IDIOMAS as A
SELECT A.oi_estado_civil, A.c_estado_civil, A.d_estado_civil FROM ORG22_EST_CIVIL as A
SELECT A.oi_titulo, A.c_titulo, A.d_titulo FROM PER04_TITULOS as A
SELECT A.oi_indic_activo, A.c_indic_activo, A.d_indic_activo FROM PER21_INDIC_ACTIVO as A
SELECT A.oi_tipo_personal, A.c_tipo_personal, A.d_tipo_personal FROM PER11_TIPOS_PERS as A
SELECT A.oi_puesto, (B.c_empresa || '-' || A.c_puesto) as c_puesto, A.d_puesto FROM ORG04_PUESTOS as A, ORG03_EMPRESAS as B JOIN A.oi_empresa inner B.oi_empresa
SELECT A.oi_posicion, A.c_posicion, A.d_posicion, A.oi_puesto FROM ORG04_POSICIONES as A
SELECT A.oi_agencia, A.c_agencia, A.d_agencia FROM PER32_AGENCIAS as A
SELECT A.oi_obra_social, A.c_obra_social, A.d_obra_social FROM PER06_OBRAS_SOC as A
SELECT A.oi_sindicato, A.c_sindicato, A.d_sindicato FROM PER30_SINDICATOS as A
SELECT A.oi_forma_pago, A.c_forma_pago, A.d_forma_pago FROM PER31_FORMAS_PAGO as A
SELECT A.oi_tipo_contrato, A.c_tipo_contrato, A.d_tipo_contrato FROM PER28_TIPOS_CONTR as A
SELECT A.oi_art, A.c_art, A.d_art FROM PER33_ART as A

select E.oi_empresa, X.oi_estructura, XU.c_unidad_org, XU.d_unidad_org from org03_empresas as E, org01_uni_org as U, org02_clases_org as C, org02_estructuras as P, org02_estructuras as X, org01_uni_org as XU where E.oi_unidad_org=U.oi_unidad_org and P.oi_unidad_org=U.oi_unidad_org and X.oi_estr_padre=P.oi_estructura and X.oi_unidad_org=XU.oi_unidad_org and C.oi_estructura_org=P.oi_estructura and C.c_estado='V' and C.l_automatica=1
SELECT A.oi_grupo_ccosto,A.c_grupo_ccosto,A.d_grupo_ccosto FROM ORG09_GR_CCOSTO as A
SELECT A.oi_centro_costo,A.c_centro_costo,A.d_centro_costo,A.oi_grupo_ccosto FROM ORG08_CS_COSTO as A
select A.oi_convenio, A.c_convenio, A.d_convenio from ORG18_CONVENIOS as A
select A.oi_categoria, A.oi_convenio, (B.c_convenio || '-' || A.c_categoria) as c_categoria, A.d_categoria from org18_categorias as A, org18_convenios as B join A.oi_convenio inner B.oi_convenio

SELECT PER.oi_personal, PER.c_personal, PER.d_ape_y_nom,
PER.c_sexo, PER.oi_grupo_sanguineo, floor( GETYEAR(NOW())-GETYEAR(PER.f_nacim)+GETMONTH(NOW())*0.0833333-GETMONTH(PER.f_nacim)*0.0833333) as edad, PER.oi_local_nacim, PER.oi_nacionalidad, PER.oi_idioma, PER.oi_estado_civil, PER.oi_titulo, PER.oi_localidad,
LEG.oi_personal_emp, LEG.oi_empresa, LEG.e_numero_legajo, GETPER(LEG.f_ingreso) as p_ingreso, GETPER(LEG.f_egreso) as p_egreso, floor( GETYEAR(NOW())-GETYEAR(LEG.f_ingreso)+GETMONTH(NOW())*0.0833333-GETMONTH(LEG.f_ingreso)*0.0833333) as antiguedad, LEG.oi_posicion_ult, LEG.oi_ctro_costo_ult, LEG.oi_categoria_ult, LEG.oi_ubicacion, LEG.oi_tipo_personal, LEG.oi_obra_social, LEG.oi_sindicato, LEG.oi_indic_activo, LEG.oi_forma_pago, LEG.oi_art, LEG.oi_motivo_eg_per, EST.oi_estructura as oi_estructura_jer, FUN.oi_estructura as oi_estructura_fun
FROM PER01_PERSONAL as PER, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP as LEG, (select EP.oi_estructura, EP.oi_personal_emp from org02_estruc_PERS as EP, org02_clases_org as C where C.oi_clase_org=EP.oi_clase_org and C.c_estado='V' and C.l_automatica=1 ) as EST,
(select EP.oi_estructura, EP.oi_personal_emp from org02_estruc_PERS as EP, org02_clases_org as C, org26_parametros as P where C.oi_clase_org=EP.oi_clase_org and C.c_clase_org=P.d_valor and P.c_modulo='ORG' and P.c_parametro='F1' and C.c_estado='V' and C.l_automatica=0 ) as FUN
JOIN PER.oi_personal inner LEG.oi_personal, LEG.oi_personal_emp left outer EST.oi_personal_emp, LEG.oi_personal_emp left outer FUN.oi_personal_emp

SELECT PER.oi_personal, PER.c_personal, PER.d_ape_y_nom,
PER.c_sexo, PER.oi_grupo_sanguineo, floor( GETYEAR(NOW())-GETYEAR(PER.f_nacim)+GETMONTH(NOW())*0.0833333-GETMONTH(PER.f_nacim)*0.0833333) as edad, PER.oi_local_nacim, PER.oi_nacionalidad, PER.oi_idioma, PER.oi_estado_civil, PER.oi_titulo, PER.oi_localidad,
LEG.oi_personal_emp, LEG.oi_empresa, LEG.e_numero_legajo, GETPER(LEG.f_ingreso) as p_ingreso, GETPER(LEG.f_egreso) as p_egreso, floor( GETYEAR(NOW())-GETYEAR(LEG.f_ingreso)+GETMONTH(NOW())*0.0833333-GETMONTH(LEG.f_ingreso)*0.0833333) as antiguedad, LEG.oi_posicion_ult, LEG.oi_ctro_costo_ult, LEG.oi_categoria_ult, LEG.oi_ubicacion, LEG.oi_tipo_personal, LEG.oi_obra_social, LEG.oi_sindicato, LEG.oi_indic_activo, LEG.oi_forma_pago, LEG.oi_art, EST.oi_estructura as oi_estructura_jer, FUN.oi_estructura as oi_estructura_fun
FROM PER01_PERSONAL as PER, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP as LEG, (select EP.oi_estructura, EP.oi_personal_emp from org02_estruc_PERS as EP, org02_clases_org as C where C.oi_clase_org=EP.oi_clase_org and C.c_estado='V' and C.l_automatica=1 ) as EST,
(select EP.oi_estructura, EP.oi_personal_emp from org02_estruc_PERS as EP, org02_clases_org as C, org26_parametros as P where C.oi_clase_org=EP.oi_clase_org and C.c_clase_org=P.d_valor and P.c_modulo='ORG' and P.c_parametro='F1' and C.c_estado='V' and C.l_automatica=0 ) as FUN
JOIN PER.oi_personal inner LEG.oi_personal, LEG.oi_personal_emp left outer EST.oi_personal_emp, LEG.oi_personal_emp left outer FUN.oi_personal_emp

SELECT PER.oi_personal, PER.c_personal, PER.d_ape_y_nom,
PER.c_sexo, PER.oi_grupo_sanguineo, floor( GETYEAR(NOW())-GETYEAR(PER.f_nacim)+GETMONTH(NOW())*0.0833333-GETMONTH(PER.f_nacim)*0.0833333) as edad, PER.oi_local_nacim, PER.oi_nacionalidad, PER.oi_idioma, PER.oi_estado_civil, PER.oi_titulo, PER.oi_localidad,
LEG.oi_personal_emp, LEG.oi_empresa, LEG.e_numero_legajo, GETPER(LEG.f_ingreso) as p_ingreso, GETPER(LEG.f_egreso) as p_egreso, floor( GETYEAR(NOW())-GETYEAR(LEG.f_ingreso)+GETMONTH(NOW())*0.0833333-GETMONTH(LEG.f_ingreso)*0.0833333) as antiguedad, LEG.oi_posicion_ult, LEG.oi_ctro_costo_ult, LEG.oi_categoria_ult, LEG.oi_ubicacion, LEG.oi_tipo_personal, LEG.oi_obra_social, LEG.oi_sindicato, LEG.oi_indic_activo, LEG.oi_forma_pago, LEG.oi_art, EST.oi_estructura as oi_estructura_jer, FUN.oi_estructura as oi_estructura_fun
FROM PER01_PERSONAL as PER, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP as LEG, (select EP.oi_estructura, EP.oi_personal_emp from org02_estruc_PERS as EP, org02_clases_org as C where C.oi_clase_org=EP.oi_clase_org and C.c_estado='V' and C.l_automatica=1 ) as EST,
(select EP.oi_estructura, EP.oi_personal_emp from org02_estruc_PERS as EP, org02_clases_org as C, org26_parametros as P where C.oi_clase_org=EP.oi_clase_org and C.c_clase_org=P.d_valor and P.c_modulo='ORG' and P.c_parametro='F1' and C.c_estado='V' and C.l_automatica=0 ) as FUN
JOIN PER.oi_personal inner LEG.oi_personal, LEG.oi_personal_emp left outer EST.oi_personal_emp, LEG.oi_personal_emp left outer FUN.oi_personal_emp
select A.oi_licencia, A.c_licencia, A.d_licencia from per16_licencias as A
SELECT MOT_EG.oi_motivo_eg_per, MOT_EG.c_motivo_eg_per, MOT_EG.d_motivo_eg_per FROM PER22_MOT_EG_PER as MOT_EG

qry:select.name: NIVEL_1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL('select E.oi_empresa, X.oi_estructura, XU.c_unidad_org, XU.d_unidad_org from org03_empresas as E, org01_uni_org as U, org02_clases_org as C, org02_estructuras as P, org02_estructuras as X, org01_uni_org as XU where E.oi_unidad_org=U.oi_unidad_org and P.oi_unidad_org=U.oi_unidad_org and X.oi_estr_padre=P.oi_estructura and X.oi_unidad_org=XU.oi_unidad_org and C.oi_estructura_org=P.oi_estructura and C.c_estado=\'V\' and C.l_automatica=1')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NIVEL_X
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL('select X.oi_estructura, X.oi_estr_padre, XU.c_unidad_org, XU.d_unidad_org from org02_estructuras as X, org01_uni_org as XU where X.oi_unidad_org=XU.oi_unidad_org and X.oi_estr_padre={#PARAM:@oi_estructura}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NIVEL_1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL('select E.oi_empresa, X.oi_estructura, XU.c_unidad_org, XU.d_unidad_org from org03_empresas as E, org01_uni_org as U, org02_clases_org as C, org02_estructuras as P, org02_estructuras as X, org01_uni_org as XU where E.oi_unidad_org=U.oi_unidad_org and P.oi_unidad_org=U.oi_unidad_org and X.oi_estr_padre=P.oi_estructura and X.oi_unidad_org=XU.oi_unidad_org and C.oi_estructura_org=P.oi_estructura and C.c_estado=\'V\' and C.l_automatica=1')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NIVEL_X
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL('select X.oi_estructura, X.oi_estr_padre, XU.c_unidad_org, XU.d_unidad_org from org02_estructuras as X, org01_uni_org as XU where X.oi_unidad_org=XU.oi_unidad_org and X.oi_estr_padre={#PARAM:@oi_estructura}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NIVEL_DEEP
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL('select X.oi_estructura, X.oi_estr_padre, XU.c_unidad_org, XU.d_unidad_org from org02_estructuras as X, org01_uni_org as XU where X.oi_unidad_org=XU.oi_unidad_org and X.oi_estr_padre={#PARAM:@oi_estructura}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NIVEL_1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL('select X.oi_estructura, XU.c_unidad_org, XU.d_unidad_org from org02_clases_org as C, org02_estructuras as X, org01_uni_org as XU where C.oi_estructura_org=X.oi_estructura and X.oi_unidad_org=XU.oi_unidad_org and C.c_clase_org={#PARAMIN:@c_clase_org} and C.c_estado=\'V\' and C.l_automatica=0')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NIVEL_1_P
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL('select X.oi_estructura, XU.c_unidad_org, XU.d_unidad_org from org02_clases_org as C, org02_estructuras as X, org01_uni_org as XU, org26_parametros as P where C.oi_estructura_org=X.oi_estructura and X.oi_unidad_org=XU.oi_unidad_org and C.c_clase_org=P.d_valor and P.c_modulo=\'ORG\' and P.c_parametro={#PARAMIN:@c_parametro} and C.c_estado=\'V\' and C.l_automatica=0')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NIVEL_X
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL('select X.oi_estructura, X.oi_estr_padre, XU.c_unidad_org, XU.d_unidad_org from org02_estructuras as X, org01_uni_org as XU where X.oi_unidad_org=XU.oi_unidad_org and X.oi_estr_padre={#PARAM:@oi_estructura}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NIVEL_1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL('select X.oi_estructura, XU.c_unidad_org, XU.d_unidad_org from org02_clases_org as C, org02_estructuras as X, org01_uni_org as XU where C.oi_estructura_org=X.oi_estructura and X.oi_unidad_org=XU.oi_unidad_org and C.c_clase_org={#PARAMIN:@c_clase_org} and C.c_estado=\'V\' and C.l_automatica=0')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NIVEL_1_P
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL('select X.oi_estructura, XU.c_unidad_org, XU.d_unidad_org from org02_clases_org as C, org02_estructuras as X, org01_uni_org as XU, org26_parametros as P where C.oi_estructura_org=X.oi_estructura and X.oi_unidad_org=XU.oi_unidad_org and C.c_clase_org=P.d_valor and P.c_modulo=\'ORG\' and P.c_parametro={#PARAMIN:@c_parametro} and C.c_estado=\'V\' and C.l_automatica=0')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NIVEL_X
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL('select X.oi_estructura, X.oi_estr_padre, XU.c_unidad_org, XU.d_unidad_org from org02_estructuras as X, org01_uni_org as XU where X.oi_unidad_org=XU.oi_unidad_org and X.oi_estr_padre={#PARAM:@oi_estructura}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NIVEL_DEEP
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL('select X.oi_estructura, X.oi_estr_padre, XU.c_unidad_org, XU.d_unidad_org from org02_estructuras as X, org01_uni_org as XU where X.oi_unidad_org=XU.oi_unidad_org and X.oi_estr_padre={#PARAM:@oi_estructura}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: ANOS
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SECUENCE('int,{%=#PARAM:@d_ano %},{%=iif(#PARAM:@h_ano='',substring(Now(),0,4),#PARAM:@h_ano) %},1')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: MESES
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SECUENCE('int,1,12,1')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: ANOS
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SECUENCE('int,{%=#PARAM:@d_ano %},{%=iif(#PARAM:@h_ano='',substring(Now(),0,4),#PARAM:@h_ano) %},1')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SQL1
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' SELECT PER.oi_personal, PER.c_personal, PER.d_ape_y_nom,
PER.c_sexo, PER.oi_grupo_sanguineo, floor( GETYEAR(NOW())-GETYEAR(PER.f_nacim)+GETMONTH(NOW())*0.0833333-GETMONTH(PER.f_nacim)*0.0833333) as edad, PER.oi_local_nacim, PER.oi_nacionalidad, PER.oi_idioma, PER.oi_estado_civil, PER.oi_titulo, PER.oi_localidad, NIV.oi_nivel_estudio
FROM PER01_PERSONAL as PER, ( select per01_estudios_per.oi_personal, max(per12_niveles_est.oi_nivel_estudio) as oi_nivel_estudio from per01_estudios_per, per12_niveles_est where per01_estudios_per.oi_nivel_estudio=per12_niveles_est.oi_nivel_estudio group by per01_estudios_per.oi_personal ) as NIV JOIN PER.oi_personal left outer NIV.oi_personal
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: ANOS
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SECUENCE('int,{%=string(number(substring(Now(),0,4))-5) %},{%=substring(Now(),0,4) %},1')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: LIC
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select A.oi_licencia, L.d_licencia, P.oi_empresa, P.oi_ubicacion, count(A.oi_licencia_per) as cant, sum(1+date2Number(A.f_fin) - date2Number(A.f_inicio)) as dias from per02_licen_per as A, per02_personal_emp as P, per16_licencias as L join A.oi_personal_emp inner P.oi_personal_emp, A.oi_licencia inner L.oi_licencia where GetYear(A.f_inicio) = {#PARAM:@value} group by A.oi_licencia, P.oi_empresa, P.oi_ubicacion, L.d_licencia ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: ANOS
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SECUENCE('int,{%=string(number(substring(Now(),0,4))-5) %},{%=substring(Now(),0,4) %},1')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: PER1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select count(A.oi_personal_emp) as cant, A.oi_empresa, A.oi_ubicacion, -1 as dias from per02_personal_emp as A where GetYear(A.f_ingreso) < {%=#PARAM:@value %} and (GetYear(A.f_egreso) > {%=#PARAM:@value %} or isNull(A.f_egreso)) group by A.oi_empresa, A.oi_ubicacion ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: PER2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select count(A.oi_personal_emp) as cant, A.oi_empresa, A.oi_ubicacion, sum(1+date2number(string2date(\'{%=#PARAM:@value %}1231\'))-floor(date2number(A.f_ingreso))) as dias from per02_personal_emp as A where GetYear(A.f_ingreso) = {%=#PARAM:@value %} and (GetYear(A.f_egreso) > {%=#PARAM:@value %} or isNull(A.f_egreso)) group by A.oi_empresa, A.oi_ubicacion ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: PER3
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select count(A.oi_personal_emp) as cant, A.oi_empresa, A.oi_ubicacion, sum(1+floor(date2number(A.f_egreso))-date2number(string2date(\'{%=#PARAM:@value %}0101\'))) as dias from per02_personal_emp as A where GetYear(A.f_ingreso) < {%=#PARAM:@value %} and GetYear(A.f_egreso) = {%=#PARAM:@value %} group by A.oi_empresa, A.oi_ubicacion ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: PER4
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select count(A.oi_personal_emp) as cant, A.oi_empresa, A.oi_ubicacion, sum(1+floor(date2number(A.f_egreso))-floor(date2number(A.f_ingreso))) as dias from per02_personal_emp as A where GetYear(A.f_ingreso) = {%=#PARAM:@value %} and GetYear(A.f_egreso) = {%=#PARAM:@value %} group by A.oi_empresa, A.oi_ubicacion ')/ROWS/ROW
